scripts.build: cd anchor && anchor build --no-idl -- --tools-version v1.52 && anchor idl build -o target/idl/pm_amm.json
scripts.deploy: bash -c 'source app/.env 2>/dev/null; solana program deploy anchor/target/deploy/pm_amm.so --keypair ~/.config/solana/phantom.json --program-id 8V872cTKfH1gC5zBvQhrQN2DXSmRNokPPjPsBE46MZNj --url "${NEXT_PUBLIC_RPC_URL:-https://api.devnet.solana.com}"'
scripts.test:all: cd anchor && cargo test --package pm_amm && cd ../oracle && python3 -m pytest test_oracle.py test_properties.py -v
scripts.musdc: cd anchor && ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=https://api.devnet.solana.com ANCHOR_WALLET=~/.config/solana/id.json pnpm exec ts-node --transpile-only -P ./tsconfig.json scripts/mint-usdc.ts
scripts.seed: bash -c 'source app/.env 2>/dev/null; cd anchor && ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL="${NEXT_PUBLIC_RPC_URL:-https://api.devnet.solana.com}" ANCHOR_WALLET=~/.config/solana/phantom.json pnpm exec ts-node --transpile-only -P ./tsconfig.json scripts/seed-markets.ts'
